description_long: This stool features a round, flat wooden seat with a matching curved wooden backrest supported by two slender vertical metal rods. The frame is constructed from thin, black metal tubing, forming four legs that angle outward for stability. A set of horizontal metal bars connects the legs, providing both structural support and a convenient footrest. The design is minimalist and functional, with clean lines and no visible decorative embellishments. The materials and construction suggest durability and suitability for high-traffic urban environments such as cafes, bars, or public waiting areas. The overall appearance is sleek and modern, with a focus on practicality and comfort.
description: A modern stool with a round wooden seat, curved backrest, and black metal frame with a footrest. Its minimalist design is both functional and stylish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the round seat, curved backrest, and angled metal legs with visible footrest.
description_view_1: Rear angled view highlighting the backrest's curvature and the supporting metal rods.
description_view_2: Back view emphasizing the open space beneath the backrest and the connecting metal bars.
description_view_3: Side-front view displaying the seat, backrest, and the structural arrangement of the legs and footrest.
